description: Create a repeatable scan that finds generated OpenAPI response components or inline response schemas where object property data is an empty schema {} and reports affected operations.
Add shared OpenAPI response-envelope helpers or conventions for typed success, array, and paginated responses to avoid future data: unknown schemas.

Replace ClientContactApiSuccess with operation-specific typed response schemas for client CRUD, client stats, client contacts, client locations, contact CRUD/search/export/stats, and client-contract-line operations.
Ensure GET /api/v1/clients/{id} returns a typed Client response envelope in CE and EE generated specs, using source behavior from ApiBaseController.getById and ClientService.getById.
Replace AccessApiSuccessV1 with typed response schemas for users, roles, permissions, RBAC, teams, and permission-check routes.
Replace ContractLineApiSuccess with typed response schemas for contract-line CRUD, bulk, analytics, activation, fixed-config, services, usage metrics, and contract-line-template routes.

Replace FinancialInvoiceApiSuccess and BillingOverviewResponse with typed response schemas for financial, invoice, billing, credit, transaction, report, payment-method, tax, and recurring invoice routes.

Replace QuickBooksV1ApiSuccess with typed response schemas for /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks and /api/v1/quickbooks duplicate route families, including sync, mapping, catalog, OAuth, health, and diagnostics responses.
Replace WebhookApiSuccessV1 with typed response schemas for webhook CRUD, analytics, events, deliveries, templates, subscriptions, validation, transformation, test, and retry routes.
Replace WorkV1ApiSuccess with typed response schemas for project, ticket, tag, schedule, time-entry, time-sheet, and time-period route families.
Replace QuotesContractsApiSuccessV1 with typed response schemas for quote and contract CRUD, quote item, approval, send, convert, revision, reminder, and contract-line association routes.
Replace MetaUtilityApiSuccessV1 with typed or bounded schemas for feature-access, feature-flags, metadata, SDK/docs, telemetry preference, and test-auth utility routes.
Where a route response is genuinely dynamic or currently a TODO/stub, model the known envelope and bounded fields explicitly instead of using bare zOpenApi.unknown for data.
Regenerate CE/legacy and EE OpenAPI JSON/YAML specs after each logical route-family batch.
Maintain zero-placeholder status in CE and EE specs while replacing generic success envelopes.
Run npm run guard:ext-v2 after source changes and avoid guarded /api/extensions/ literals in OpenAPI registrar source.
Update SCRATCHPAD.md with scan counts, route-family progress, allowlist decisions, command results, and final validation outcomes.
Commit and push focused changes to the OpenAPI PR branch without staging the pre-existing .env.localtest modification.
